LAW AND MOTION 301, AMENDED NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD & FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. PETITIONER A.G. EDWARDS & SONS'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED -- NO OPPOSITION FILED. HON. JAMES J. MCBRIDE. REPORTER: ERIC THRONE CSR# 7855

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER A.G. EDWARDS & SONS, INC. A CORPORATION RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT AYENI, ANTHONY $15,221.58 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,221.58, (SEE ATTACHED ARBITRATOR'S AWARD) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
